summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PharmaCare Dashboard Analytics Enhancement. All 12 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts rendering warning during initial load, does not affect functionality

backend: Dashboard returns metrics object with today_sales, today_change, week_sales, week_change, month_sales, month_change, total_sales
Dashboard returns daily_trend array with up to 14 days of data
Dashboard returns top_products array (max 5) with name, revenue, qty
Dashboard returns top_customers array (max 5) with name, revenue, bills
Dashboard returns low_stock array with product_name, batch_no, qty
Dashboard returns expiring_soon array with product_name, batch_no, expiry_date
Dashboard returns recent_bills array (max 5) with id, bill_number, customer_name, amount
Dashboard returns quick_stats with pending_payments, draft_bills, month_returns, stock_value, low_stock_count, expiring_count
Dashboard endpoint requires authentication (returns 401 without token)
Percentage changes are valid numeric values
frontend: Today's Sales card displays with value and percentage change indicator
Week Sales card displays with value and percentage change indicator
Month Sales card displays with value and percentage change indicator
Total Sales card displays with value
Sales Trend chart renders with last 14 days data
Category chart shows 'No category data available' (expected - products don't have category populated)
Top Selling Products section shows 5 products with revenue and qty sold
Top Customers section shows 5 customers with revenue and order count
Low Stock alerts section shows items with low quantity (2 items)
Expiring Soon alerts section shows items expiring within 30 days (12 items)
Recent Bills section shows 5 clickable recent bills
Recent bill click navigates to bill detail page correctly
Quick Stats row shows Pending Payments (₹1.1K)
Quick Stats row shows Draft Bills (5)
Quick Stats row shows Returns Month (₹315)
Quick Stats row shows Stock Value (₹1.1L)
Refresh button works and reloads data successfully

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js correctly uses data-testid attributes for all major components
API endpoint at /api/analytics/dashboard returns comprehensive data structure
Recharts library properly integrated for Sales Trend and Category charts
Category sales shows 'No category data' because products don't have category field populated - this is expected behavior as noted by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Analytics Enhancement fully tested and working. All sections render correctly: Key Metrics (4 cards with % changes), Sales Trend chart (14 days), Category chart (shows 'No category data' - expected), Top Products (5), Top Customers (5), Low Stock alerts (2 items), Expiring Soon alerts (12 items), Recent Bills (5 clickable), Quick Stats (4 stats). Refresh button works. Recent bill click navigates to detail page. Test user: testadmin@pharmacy.com/admin123
